chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-3724 of 2025 Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) For orders as to non-prosecution. 21.08.2025. None present for the petitioner. ************* None present on behalf of the petitioner. Since the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government of Sindh and the alternate remedy has been provided; therefore, this petition stands disposed of with the directions to the petitioner to approach learned trial court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS*
